name: DataForSEO
description: Complete SEO data platform — SERP tracking, keyword research, backlink analysis, on-page audits, competitor intelligence, content analysis, domain insights, and AI optimization

tools.name: locations_and_languages
tools.description: List DataForSEO Labs locations and languages for Google, Bing, and Amazon. Free endpoint used to populate SEO app locales.

tools.name: keyword_search_volume
tools.description: Get search volume, competition, CPC data, and monthly trends for keywords via Google Ads API. Max 1000 keywords per request.

tools.name: keyword_suggestions
tools.description: Get keyword suggestions and ideas based on seed keywords from Google Ads data, with search volume and competition metrics

tools.name: keyword_ideas
tools.description: Get keyword ideas from DataForSEO Labs database with keyword difficulty, search volume, and SERP features

tools.name: keyword_difficulty
tools.description: Get keyword difficulty scores in bulk — indicates how hard it is to rank in the top 10 for each keyword

tools.name: search_intent
tools.description: Classify the search intent of keywords (informational, navigational, commercial, transactional)

tools.name: serp_organic
tools.description: Get live Google organic search results with rankings, snippets, featured elements, and SERP features

tools.name: serp_maps
tools.description: Get Google Maps local search results for a keyword with business listings, ratings, and locations

tools.name: serp_news
tools.description: Get Google News search results for a keyword

tools.name: google_autocomplete
tools.description: Get Google autocomplete suggestions for a keyword — useful for content ideas and long-tail keyword discovery

tools.name: ranked_keywords
tools.description: Get all keywords a domain ranks for in organic search with positions, search volume, and traffic estimates

tools.name: domain_rank_overview
tools.description: Get domain-level SEO overview: organic traffic estimate, total keywords, visibility score, and rank distribution

tools.name: traffic_estimation
tools.description: Estimate organic traffic for multiple domains in bulk — includes keyword count, traffic cost, and estimated visits

tools.name: competitors
tools.description: Find organic search competitors for a domain based on shared keyword rankings

tools.name: domain_intersection
tools.description: Find keyword overlap/gaps between domains for competitive gap analysis. Compare up to 20 domains.

tools.name: relevant_pages
tools.description: Find the most relevant/important pages on a domain based on organic rankings and traffic

tools.name: historical_serps
tools.description: Get historical Google SERP snapshots for a keyword — see how rankings changed over time

keyword.description: Keyword to get historical SERPs for

tools.name: backlinks_summary
tools.description: Get complete backlink profile summary: rank, referring domains, backlink counts, dofollow/nofollow ratio, and more

tools.name: backlinks_list
tools.description: Get detailed list of backlinks with anchor text, source URLs, link type, and attributes

tools.name: referring_domains
tools.description: Get list of domains linking to a target with domain rank, backlink count, and first/last seen dates

tools.name: backlinks_anchors
tools.description: Get anchor text distribution for a domain's backlink profile

tools.name: backlinks_competitors
tools.description: Find domains competing for the same backlinks as your target domain

target.description: Domain to find link competitors for

tools.name: backlinks_domain_intersection
tools.description: Find domains linking to competitors but not to your target — the backlink gap for link building opportunities

exclude_targets.description: Domains to exclude (typically your own domain)

tools.name: bulk_domain_ranks
tools.description: Get domain/page rank scores for multiple targets in bulk — quick authority check

tools.name: bulk_spam_score
tools.description: Check spam scores for multiple domains in bulk

targets.description: Domains to check spam score for (max 1000)

tools.name: onpage_instant
tools.description: Instant single-page SEO analysis: meta tags, headings, content, images, links, Core Web Vitals, structured data

tools.name: lighthouse
tools.description: Run a Google Lighthouse audit on a page — performance, accessibility, best practices, and SEO scores

categories.description: Categories to audit: performance, accessibility, best-practices, seo

tools.name: content_parsing
tools.description: Extract and parse structured content from a web page — text, headings, links, images, and metadata

tools.name: domain_technologies
tools.description: Detect all technologies used by a domain: CMS, frameworks, analytics, CDN, hosting, and more

tools.name: domains_by_technology
tools.description: Find domains using a specific technology (e.g., 'WordPress', 'Shopify', 'React')

tools.name: domain_whois
tools.description: Get WHOIS information: registrar, creation/expiry dates, nameservers, and contact details

tools.name: google_reviews
tools.description: Get Google reviews and ratings for a business location by name, CID, or Place ID

tools.name: google_business_info
tools.description: Get Google My Business / Knowledge Graph information for a business

tools.name: content_analysis_search
tools.description: Find online mentions and citations for a keyword across the web with sentiment and source data

keyword.description: Keyword or brand to search for

tools.name: content_analysis_summary
tools.description: Get aggregated content analysis summary for a keyword: total mentions, sentiment breakdown, top sources

tools.name: content_sentiment
tools.description: Get sentiment polarity and connotation breakdown for a keyword across web content

keyword.description: Keyword or brand to analyze sentiment for

tools.name: google_trends
tools.description: Get Google Trends data for keywords — search interest over time with geographic breakdown

tools.name: ai_mentions
tools.description: Track brand or keyword mentions across LLM outputs (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) — AI visibility monitoring

keyword.description: Keyword or brand to track in AI outputs

tools.name: ai_top_domains
tools.description: Get top domains mentioned by LLMs for a keyword — see which sites AI models recommend

keyword.description: Keyword to check top mentioned domains for

tools.name: youtube_locations
tools.description: List supported YouTube SERP locations for DataForSEO YouTube endpoints.

tools.name: youtube_languages
tools.description: List supported YouTube SERP languages for DataForSEO YouTube endpoints.

tools.name: youtube_organic_serp
tools.description: Get live YouTube search results for a keyword, including ranked videos/channels and SERP metadata.

os.description: Device operating system, such as windows, macos, android, or ios

tools.name: youtube_video_info
tools.description: Get live metadata for a YouTube video by video_id.

os.description: Desktop operating system, such as windows or macos

tools.name: youtube_video_subtitles
tools.description: Get live subtitles/transcript data for a YouTube video by video_id.

os.description: Device operating system, such as windows, macos, android, or ios

subtitles_language.description: Original subtitles language code to retrieve

tools.name: youtube_video_comments
tools.description: Get live YouTube video comments for a video by video_id.

sort_by.description: Comment sort order, for example top or newest

os.description: Device operating system, such as windows, macos, android, or ios

tools.name: amazon_locations
tools.description: List supported Amazon Merchant API locations.

tools.name: amazon_languages
tools.description: List supported Amazon Merchant API languages.

tools.name: amazon_products_serp
tools.description: Get live Amazon product search results for a keyword.

asin.description: Optional ASIN for product context where supported

se_domain.description: Amazon search engine domain, e.g. amazon.com

tools.name: amazon_asin_info
tools.description: Get live Amazon product details by ASIN.

se_domain.description: Amazon search engine domain, e.g. amazon.com

tools.name: amazon_sellers
tools.description: Get live Amazon sellers/offers for a product ASIN.

se_domain.description: Amazon search engine domain, e.g. amazon.com

tools.name: amazon_reviews_task_post
tools.description: Create a DataForSEO task for Amazon product reviews by ASIN.

se_domain.description: Amazon search engine domain, e.g. amazon.com

tools.name: amazon_reviews_task_get
tools.description: Get completed Amazon product reviews task results by DataForSEO task id.

tools.name: amazon_labs_bulk_search_volume
tools.description: Get Amazon keyword search volume in bulk from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: amazon_labs_related_keywords
tools.description: Get related Amazon keywords for a seed keyword from DataForSEO Labs.

include_seed_keyword.description: Include the seed keyword in results

tools.name: amazon_labs_ranked_keywords
tools.description: Get Amazon keywords an ASIN ranks for from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: amazon_labs_product_rank_overview
tools.description: Get Amazon product ranking overview metrics by ASIN from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: amazon_labs_product_competitors
tools.description: Get competing Amazon products for an ASIN from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: amazon_labs_product_keyword_intersections
tools.description: Find Amazon keyword overlaps/gaps across ASINs from DataForSEO Labs.

asins.description: Map of comparison slots to Amazon ASINs, e.g. {"1":"B001...","2":"B002..."}

tools.name: app_data_google_locations

app_id.description: Google Play app ID, e.g. org.telegram.messenger

tools.description: Get completed Google Play app info task results by DataForSEO task id.

tools.description: Create a Google Play app reviews task by app_id.

sort_by.description: Review sort order, such as newest or most_relevant

tools.description: Get completed Google Play app reviews task results by DataForSEO task id.

tools.name: app_data_google_app_listings_search

tools.name: google_play_labs_bulk_app_metrics
tools.description: Get Google Play ranking metrics for up to 1000 apps from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: google_play_labs_keywords_for_app
tools.description: Get keywords a Google Play app ranks for from DataForSEO Labs.

tools.name: google_play_labs_app_competitors

tools.name: google_play_labs_app_intersection
tools.description: Find Google Play keyword overlaps/gaps across apps from DataForSEO Labs.
